title: [FUTURE] Add embeddings for durable world pages in MemorySmith
description:
Once MemorySmith backend exposes embedding/vector search, add semantic embeddings to durable world pages so the agent can find similar past situations.

This is explicitly a FUTURE phase (Phase 4) per the design doc. Do not start until:
- MemorySmith server supports vector search endpoints.
- `RestMemoryGateway` has been updated with embedding-aware methods.

Implementation sketch:
1. Generate embeddings for snapshot, landmark, and goal pages.
2. Use vector similarity to find: "similar past build sites", "similar failure patterns", "nearby landmarks".
3. Include semantic hits in `ScenePack.MemoryReferences`.
4. Add `SearchMemory` tool support for semantic queries.

Acceptance: Deferred until MemorySmith backend supports it.

Refs: `memorysmith_situational_awareness_design_doc_20260625T020914Z.md` Phase 4
blockedReason: MemorySmith backend does not yet expose embedding/vector search endpoints.
